The experience
More than coffee —
a highland escape
Cool Amadeo air, a garden made for slow afternoons, and good games with friends. Come for an hour, lose track of three.
🌿 Nature & Fresh Air
Bougainvillea, big trees and cool highland breeze — the whole garden is your seat.
☕ Specialty Coffee
Local Philippine beans, pulled with care.
🎾 Pickleball, Basketball & Darts
Play a game, then cool down with coffee.
🫘 Beans & Market
Take home local beans, fresh eggs & produce.
👨‍👩‍👧 Family & Friends All welcome
Room for the whole barkada and the kids.
